phase_history.key_outcome: All 5 bugs fixed. 33/33 tests pass, 98% coverage.
GO — 0 Critical/High bugs, 33/33 tests pass, 98% coverage, all smoke tests clean.
Release artifacts ready. 33/33 tests pass, 98% coverage, lint clean. Pending: pip-audit + git tag.

active_concerns: pip-audit not run — run before tagging v0.1.0
if env is None fallback (config.py:70-72) uncovered — intentional, not a gap

terminology.Foundation: Technical skeleton: toolchain + port interfaces + config loader + CLI stub
terminology.Port interface: Python Protocol/ABC defining external dependency contract without implementation
terminology.Config: Validated in-memory object from config.toml + env vars
terminology.WatchedRepo: Validated org/repo entry with owner+name fields and full_name property
terminology.FakeSummaryCache: In-memory SummaryCache for tests — no Redis
terminology.Fail fast: Exit with clear error + non-zero exit code before pipeline starts
terminology.ConfigError: Exception raised by config.py; caught only at CLI boundary (BR-1-007)
terminology.ConfigError boundary: Single try/except in cli.py converting ConfigError to stderr + Exit(1)
terminology.Bool trap: bool is int subclass; reject lookback_days bool via type() is int
terminology.Coverage omit: pyproject.toml omits ports.py + pipeline.py from coverage (ADR-004/BR-1-006)
terminology.x-cli-commands: OpenAPI extension documenting CLI contract (no HTTP paths)
terminology.api_key_env: Optional config key in [llm] section to override which env var holds the LLM API key (default: LLM_API_KEY)

watch_items: Run pip-audit before tagging (not available in dev env during S5)
CI gate must pass on main before git tag v0.1.0
